---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
One-line description of the requested feature.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve or what research question does it enable?

## Proposed solution
How you think it should work. Include code sketches if helpful.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Affected components
- [ ] Hardware acquisition (CCS200)
- [ ] Signal preprocessing
- [ ] Calibration / GPR
- [ ] CNN classifier
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] CLI / run.py
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
